title: ContactHandle
description: A communication handle (such as a phone number, email address, or chat URL) used to contact a driver or support agent in a mobility service.

handleType.description: Type of contact handle (PHONE, EMAIL, CHAT, APP)

handle.description: The actual contact handle value (number, address, or URL)

label.description: Human-readable label for this contact handle

url.description: URL to support portal or chat interface
